patches.hypothesis: The patch was refined to address overfitting, edge case handling, and improper handling of the stopAtNonOption argument. The updated code is more robust and handles a wider range of inputs.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug was caused by the incorrect handling of the stopAtNonOption argument, which resulted in the parser stopping at the first non-Option encountered instead of processing the entire token. The fix involves updating the method to properly handle the stopAtNonOption argument and continue processing the token even if an Option does not exist.
